tEn: data2vec: A General Framework for Self-supervised Learning in Speech, Vision and Language
tZh: data2vec：语音、视觉和语言自监督学习的通用框架
sEn: data2vec proposes a unified self-supervised learning framework across speech, NLP, and vision by predicting contextualized latent representations instead of modality-specific targets.
sZh: data2vec 提出了一种跨语音、自然语言处理和视觉的统一自监督学习框架，通过预测上下文相关的潜在表示而非模态特定的目标。
absEn: While the general idea of self-supervised learning is identical across modalities, the actual algorithms and objectives differ widely because they were developed with a single modality in mind. To get us closer to general self-supervised learning, we present data2vec, a framework that uses the same learning method for either speech, NLP or computer vision. The core idea is to predict latent representations of the full input data based on a masked view of the input in a self-distillation setup using a standard Transformer architecture. Instead of predicting modality-specific targets such as words, visual tokens or units of human speech which are local in nature, data2vec predicts contextualized latent representations that contain information from the entire input. Experiments on the major benchmarks of speech recognition, image classification, and natural language understanding demonstrate a new state of the art or competitive performance to predominant approaches.
absZh: 虽然自监督学习的总体思路在不同模态间是相同的，但实际的算法和目标却因针对单一模态开发而差异很大。为了更接近通用的自监督学习，我们提出了 data2vec，这是一个在语音、自然语言处理或计算机视觉中使用相同学习方法的框架。其核心思想是在自蒸馏设置下，使用标准 Transformer 架构，基于输入的掩码视图来预测完整输入数据的潜在表示。与预测模态特定的目标（如单词、视觉标记或人类语音单元）不同，这些目标本质上是局部的，而 data2vec 预测的是包含整个输入信息的上下文相关潜在表示。在语音识别、图像分类和自然语言理解等主要基准上的实验表明，该方法达到了新的最优性能或与主流方法相当的表现。

contrib.en: Proposes data2vec, a unified self-supervised learning framework for speech, vision, and language using the same objective.
contrib.zh: 提出 data2vec，一个统一的自我监督学习框架，适用于语音、视觉和语言，使用相同的学习目标。

contrib.en: Predicts contextualized latent representations from masked input via self-distillation with a standard Transformer.
contrib.zh: 通过标准 Transformer 的自蒸馏，从掩码输入预测上下文化的潜在表示。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art or competitive results on ImageNet-1K, Librispeech, and GLUE benchmarks.
contrib.zh: 在 ImageNet-1K、Librispeech 和 GLUE 基准上取得最先进或具有竞争力的结果。

contrib.en: Uses multi-layer target averaging from teacher network, improving over single-layer targets like BYOL.
contrib.zh: 使用教师网络的多层目标平均，优于 BYOL 等单层目标方法。

contrib.en: First NLP model to predict continuous latent targets instead of discrete tokens, enabling open-vocabulary learning.
contrib.zh: 首个预测连续潜在目标而非离散 token 的 NLP 模型，实现开放词汇学习。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that contextualized targets from full input outperform local targets in self-supervised learning.
contrib.zh: 证明来自完整输入的上下文化目标在自我监督学习中优于局部目标。

limits.en: Still uses modality-specific feature encoders and masking strategies, not fully unified.
limits.zh: 仍使用模态特定的特征编码器和掩码策略，未完全统一。

limits.en: Requires careful tuning of hyperparameters like learning rate and momentum to avoid representation collapse.
limits.zh: 需要仔细调整学习率和动量等超参数以避免表示崩溃。

limits.en: Performance on speech recognition relies on large pre-training data (960 hours) and may not generalize to low-resource languages.
limits.zh: 语音识别性能依赖大量预训练数据（960 小时），可能无法泛化到低资源语言。

limits.en: Does not explore multi-modal joint training; only learns representations for each modality separately.
limits.zh: 未探索多模态联合训练；仅单独学习每种模态的表示。

limits.en: Contextualized targets require full teacher forward pass, increasing computational cost compared to local targets.
limits.zh: 上下文化目标需要完整的教师前向传播，相比局部目标增加了计算成本。

items.en: While the general idea of self-supervised learning is identical across modalities, the actual algorithms and objectives differ widely because they were developed with a single modality in mind. To get us closer to general self-supervised learning, we present data2vec, a framework that uses the same learning method for either speech, NLP or computer vision. The core idea is to predict latent representations of the full input data based on a masked view of the input in a self-distillation setup using a standard Transformer architecture. Instead of predicting modality-specific targets such as words, visual tokens or units of human speech which are local in nature, data2vec predicts contextualized latent representations that contain information from the entire input. Experiments on the major benchmarks of speech recognition, image classification, and natural language understanding demonstrate a new state of the art or competitive performance to predominant approaches. Models and code are available at www.github.com/pytorch/fairseq/tree/master/examples/data2vec.
items.zh: 虽然自监督学习的总体思想在不同模态间是相同的，但实际算法和目标差异很大，因为它们是为单一模态开发的。为了更接近通用的自监督学习，我们提出了 data2vec，这是一个使用相同学习方法处理语音、自然语言处理或计算机视觉的框架。核心思想是在自蒸馏设置中，使用标准 Transformer 架构，基于输入的掩码视图预测完整输入数据的潜在表示。data2vec 不预测局部性的模态特定目标（如单词、视觉标记或人类语音单元），而是预测包含整个输入信息的上下文潜在表示。在语音识别、图像分类和自然语言理解等主要基准上的实验表明，与主流方法相比，data2vec 取得了新的最优或具有竞争力的性能。模型和代码可在 www.github.com/pytorch/fairseq/tree/master/examples/data2vec 获取。

items.en: Self-supervised learning builds representations of data without human annotated labels which led to significant advances in natural language processing (NLP; Peters et al. 2018; Radford et al. 2018; Devlin et al. 2019; Brown et al. 2020), speech processing (van den Oord et al., 2018; Schneider et al., 2019; Baevski et al., 2020b) as well as computer vision (Chen et al., 2020, 2021b; Caron et al., 2021; Bao et al., 2021; He et al., 2021). Self-supervised representations have even enabled completely unsupervised learning in tasks such as machine translation (Lample et al., 2018) and speech recognition (Baevski et al., 2021).
items.zh: 自监督学习无需人工标注标签即可构建数据表示，这推动了自然语言处理（NLP；Peters 等人，2018；Radford 等人，2018；Devlin 等人，2019；Brown 等人，2020）、语音处理（van den Oord 等人，2018；Schneider 等人，2019；Baevski 等人，2020b）以及计算机视觉（Chen 等人，2020，2021b；Caron 等人，2021；Bao 等人，2021；He 等人，2021）的重大进展。自监督表示甚至实现了机器翻译（Lample 等人，2018）和语音识别（Baevski 等人，2021）等任务中的完全无监督学习。

items.en: Research in self-supervised algorithms has focused on individual modalities which results in specific designs and learning biases. For example, in speech processing, there is no vocabulary of speech units over which we can define a self-supervised learning task such as words in NLP111This is true for many languages but not for certain Asian languages. and therefore several prominent models are equipped with mechanisms to learn an inventory of speech units (Baevski et al., 2020b; Hsu et al., 2021). A similar problem exists for computer vision, where researchers either learn discrete visual tokens (Radford et al., 2021a; Bao et al., 2021), regress the input (He et al., 2021) or learn representations invariant to data augmentation (Chen et al., 2020; Grill et al., 2020; Caron et al., 2021).
items.zh: 自监督算法的研究一直专注于单个模态，这导致了特定的设计和学习偏差。例如，在语音处理中，没有语音单元的词汇表来定义自监督学习任务（如 NLP 中的单词¹¹），因此一些主流模型配备了学习语音单元库的机制（Baevski 等人，2020b；Hsu 等人，2021）。计算机视觉也存在类似问题，研究者要么学习离散的视觉标记（Radford 等人，2021a；Bao 等人，2021），要么回归输入（He 等人，2021），要么学习对数据增强不变的表示（Chen 等人，2020；Grill 等人，2020；Caron 等人，2021）。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Illustration of how data2vec follows the same learning process for different modalities. The model first produces representations of the original input example (teacher mode) which are then regressed by the same model based on a masked version of the input. The teacher parameters are an exponentially moving average of the student weights. The student predicts the average of K𝐾K network layers of the teacher (shaded in blue).
items.capZh: 图 1：data2vec 如何对不同模态遵循相同学习过程的示意图。模型首先生成原始输入示例的表示（教师模式），然后由同一模型基于输入的掩码版本进行回归。教师参数是学生权重的指数移动平均。学生预测教师 K 个网络层的平均值（蓝色阴影部分）。

items.en: While learning biases are certainly helpful, it is often unclear whether they will generalize to other modalities. Moreover, leading theories on the biology of learning (Friston & Kiebel, 2009; Friston, 2010) imply that humans likely use similar learning processes to understand the visual world as they do for language. Relatedly, general neural network architectures have been shown to perform very well compared to modality-specific counterparts (Jaegle et al., 2021b).
items.zh: 虽然学习偏差肯定是有帮助的，但它们是否能泛化到其他模态通常并不明确。此外，关于学习生物学的主流理论（Friston & Kiebel, 2009; Friston, 2010）暗示，人类理解视觉世界的过程可能与理解语言的过程类似。与此相关的是，通用神经网络架构已被证明比特定模态的对应架构表现更好（Jaegle 等人，2021b）。

items.en: In an effort to get closer to machines that learn in general ways about the environment, we designed data2vec, a framework for general self-supervised learning that works for images, speech and text where the learning objective is identical in each modality. The present work unifies the learning algorithm but still learns representations individually for each modality. We hope that a single algorithm will make future multi-modal learning simpler, more effective and lead to models that understand the world better through multiple modalities.
items.zh: 为了更接近以通用方式学习环境的机器，我们设计了 data2vec，这是一个适用于图像、语音和文本的通用自监督学习框架，其学习目标在每个模态中都是相同的。当前工作统一了学习算法，但仍然为每个模态单独学习表示。我们希望单一算法将使未来的多模态学习更简单、更有效，并产生通过多种模态更好地理解世界的模型。

items.en: Our method combines masked prediction (Devlin et al., 2019; Baevski et al., 2020b; Bao et al., 2021) with the learning of latent target representations (Grill et al., 2020; Caron et al., 2021) but generalizes the latter by using multiple network layers as targets and shows that this approach works across several modalities. Specifically, we train an off-the-shelf Transformer network (Vaswani et al., 2017) which we use either in teacher or student mode (Illustration in Figure 1): we first build representations of the full input data whose purpose is to serve as targets in the learning task (teacher mode). Next, we encode a masked version of the input sample with which we predict the full data representations (student mode). The weights of the teacher are an exponentially decaying average of the student (He et al., 2019; Grill et al., 2020; Caron et al., 2021). Since different modalities have vastly different inputs, e.g., pixels vs. words, we use modality-specific feature encoders and masking strategies from the literature.
items.zh: 我们的方法结合了掩码预测（Devlin 等人，2019；Baevski 等人，2020b；Bao 等人，2021）和潜在目标表示学习（Grill 等人，2020；Caron 等人，2021），但通过使用多个网络层作为目标来泛化后者，并表明这种方法在多种模态中有效。具体来说，我们训练一个现成的 Transformer 网络（Vaswani 等人，2017），以教师或学生模式使用（图 1 示意）：首先构建完整输入数据的表示，作为学习任务的目标（教师模式）。然后，编码输入样本的掩码版本，并用其预测完整数据表示（学生模式）。教师的权重是学生权重的指数衰减平均（He 等人，2019；Grill 等人，2020；Caron 等人，2021）。由于不同模态的输入差异很大（例如像素与单词），我们使用文献中的模态特定特征编码器和掩码策略。

items.en: Since our method works with the latent network representations of the learner itself, it can be seen as a simplification of many modality-specific designs such as learning a fixed set of visual tokens (Radford et al., 2021a; van den Oord et al., 2017), or normalization of the input to create suitable targets (He et al., 2021), or the learning of a vocabulary of discrete speech units (Baevski et al., 2020b; Hsu et al., 2021). Moreover, our target representations are continuous and contextualized, through the use of self-attention, which makes them richer than a fixed set of targets and/or targets based on local context such as used in most prior work.
items.zh: 由于我们的方法使用学习者自身的潜在网络表示，因此可以看作是对许多模态特定设计的简化，例如学习固定视觉标记集（Radford 等人，2021a；van den Oord 等人，2017）、归一化输入以创建合适的目标（He 等人，2021），或学习离散语音单元词汇表（Baevski 等人，2020b；Hsu 等人，2021）。此外，我们的目标表示是连续且上下文化的，通过使用自注意力机制，使其比固定目标集和/或基于局部上下文的目标（如大多数先前工作中使用的）更丰富。

items.en: Experimental results show data2vec to be effective in all three modalities, setting a new state of the art for ViT-B with single models and ViT-L on ImageNet-1K, improving over the best prior work in speech processing on speech recognition (Baevski et al., 2020b; Hsu et al., 2021) and outperforming a like for like RoBERTa baseline on the GLUE natural language understanding benchmark (Liu et al., 2019).
items.zh: 实验结果表明，data2vec 在所有三种模态中均有效，在 ImageNet-1K 上使用单模型 ViT-B 和 ViT-L 取得了新的最优结果，在语音处理方面优于语音识别的最佳先前工作（Baevski 等人，2020b；Hsu 等人，2021），并在 GLUE 自然语言理解基准（Liu 等人，2019）上超越了同等的 RoBERTa 基线。

items.en: Unsupervised pre-training for computer vision has been a very active area of research with methods contrasting representations of augmentations of the same image, entirely different images (Chen et al., 2020; Grill et al., 2020; Caron et al., 2021; Chen et al., 2021b) as well as online clustering (Caron et al., 2020). Similar to our work, both BYOL (Grill et al., 2020) and DINO (Caron et al., 2021) regress neural network representations of a momentum encoder, but our work differs in that it uses a masked prediction task and we regress multiple neural network layer representations instead of just the top layer which we find to be more effective. Moreover, data2vec works for multiple modalities.
items.zh: 计算机视觉的无监督预训练一直是一个非常活跃的研究领域，方法包括对比同一图像增强表示、完全不同图像（Chen 等人，2020；Grill 等人，2020；Caron 等人，2021；Chen 等人，2021b）以及在线聚类（Caron 等人，2020）。与我们的工作类似，BYOL（Grill 等人，2020）和 DINO（Caron 等人，2021）都回归动量编码器的神经网络表示，但我们的工作不同之处在于使用了掩码预测任务，并且我们回归多个神经网络层表示而不仅仅是顶层，我们发现这样更有效。此外，data2vec 适用于多种模态。

items.en: The most recent work focuses on training vision Transformers (Dosovitskiy et al., 2020) with masked prediction objectives (Bao et al., 2021; He et al., 2021; Xie et al., 2021) whose performance surpasses supervised-only training on ImageNet-1K. Several of these methods predict visual tokens (Bao et al., 2021; He et al., 2021; Dong et al., 2022) learned in a separate step before pre-training (van den Oord et al., 2017; Ramesh et al., 2021), during pretraining (Zhou et al., 2021), and others directly predict the input pixels (He et al., 2021; Xie et al., 2021).
items.zh: 最近的工作集中在使用掩码预测目标训练视觉 Transformer（Dosovitskiy 等人，2020）（Bao 等人，2021；He 等人，2021；Xie 等人，2021），其性能超过了 ImageNet-1K 上的纯监督训练。其中一些方法预测视觉标记（Bao 等人，2021；He 等人，2021；Dong 等人，2022），这些标记在预训练之前（van den Oord 等人，2017；Ramesh 等人，2021）或预训练期间（Zhou 等人，2021）单独学习，而其他方法直接预测输入像素（He 等人，2021；Xie 等人，2021）。

items.en: Instead, data2vec predicts the latent representations of the input data. Another difference to this body of work is that the latent target representations are contextualized, incorporating relevant features from the entire image instead of targets which contain information isolated to the current patch, such as visual tokens or pixels.
items.zh: 相反，data2vec 预测输入数据的潜在表示。与这类工作的另一个区别是，潜在目标表示是上下文化的，融合了来自整个图像的相关特征，而不是包含仅限于当前补丁信息的目标（如视觉标记或像素）。

items.en: Pre-training has been very successful in advancing natural language understanding (McCann et al., 2017; Peters et al., 2018; Radford et al., 2018; Baevski et al., 2019; Devlin et al., 2019; Yang et al., 2019; Brown et al., 2020). The most prominent model is BERT (Devlin et al., 2019) which solves a masked prediction task where some of the input tokens are blanked out in order to be predicted given the remaining input. For many languages it is easy to determine word boundaries and most methods therefore predict word or sub-word units for pre-training. There is also work on knowledge distillation to obtain smaller BERT-style models, both for pre-training and fine-tuning (Jiao et al., 2020).
items.zh: 预训练在推进自然语言理解方面非常成功（McCann 等人，2017；Peters 等人，2018；Radford 等人，2018；Baevski 等人，2019；Devlin 等人，2019；Yang 等人，2019；Brown 等人，2020）。最著名的模型是 BERT（Devlin 等人，2019），它解决了一个掩码预测任务，其中一些输入标记被遮盖，以便根据剩余输入进行预测。对于许多语言，确定词边界很容易，因此大多数方法预测单词或子词单元进行预训练。也有关于知识蒸馏以获得更小的 BERT 风格模型的工作，既用于预训练也用于微调（Jiao 等人，2020）。

items.en: Compared to prior NLP algorithms, data2vec does not predict discrete linguistic tokens such as words, sub-words or bytes but rather a continuous and contextualized representation. This has two advantages: first, the targets themselves are not predefined, nor is their number limited. This enables the model to adapt to a particular input example. Second, targets are contextualized, taking context information into account. This is unlike BERT-style models which learn a single embedding for each target which needs to fit all instances of a particular target in the data.
items.zh: 与先前的 NLP 算法相比，data2vec 不预测离散的语言标记（如单词、子词或字节），而是预测连续且上下文化的表示。这有两个优点：首先，目标本身不是预定义的，其数量也不受限制。这使得模型能够适应特定的输入示例。其次，目标是上下文化的，考虑了上下文信息。这与 BERT 风格模型不同，后者为每个目标学习一个单一的嵌入，该嵌入需要适应数据中该特定目标的所有实例。

items.en: Work in self-supervised learning for speech includes autoregressive models (van den Oord et al., 2018; Schneider et al., 2019; Baevski et al., 2020a; Chung et al., 2019) as well as bi-directional models (Baevski et al., 2020b; Hsu et al., 2021; Ao et al., 2021; Chen et al., 2021a). Two prominent models, wav2vec 2.0 and HuBERT are based on predicting discrete units of speech, either learned jointly during pre-training (Baevski et al., 2020b), or in an iterative pipeline approach (Hsu et al., 2021) where pre-training and clustering alternate.222Quantization is optional for wav2vec 2.0 (Baevski et al., 2020b; Zhang et al., 2020) but helpful for noisy speech (Chung et al., 2021). Another line of work directly reconstructs the input features (Eloff et al., 2019; Liu et al., 2021).
items.zh: 语音自监督学习的工作包括自回归模型（van den Oord 等人，2018；Schneider 等人，2019；Baevski 等人，2020a；Chung 等人，2019）以及双向模型（Baevski 等人，2020b；Hsu 等人，2021；Ao 等人，2021；Chen 等人，2021a）。两个著名模型 wav2vec 2.0 和 HuBERT 基于预测离散的语音单元，这些单元要么在预训练期间联合学习（Baevski 等人，2020b），要么在迭代流水线方法中交替进行预训练和聚类（Hsu 等人，2021）²²。另一条工作线直接重建输入特征（Eloff 等人，2019；Liu 等人，2021）。

items.en: In comparison to wav2vec 2.0, data2vec directly predicts contextualized latent representations without quantization. HuBERT discretizes representations from different layers across iterations and predicts these discretized units whereas data2vec predicts the average over multiple layers. Similar to other modalities, there is work on distilling larger self-supervised models into smaller models but primarily for the purpose of efficiency (Chang et al., 2021).
items.zh: 与 wav2vec 2.0 相比，data2vec 直接预测上下文化的潜在表示，无需量化。HuBERT 在不同迭代中离散化来自不同层的表示并预测这些离散化单元，而 data2vec 预测多个层的平均值。与其他模态类似，也有将较大的自监督模型蒸馏为较小模型的工作，但主要是为了提高效率（Chang 等人，2021）。

items.en: There has been a considerable body of research on learning representations of multiple modalities simultaneously often using paired data (Aytar et al., 2017; Radford et al., 2021b; Wang et al., 2021; Singh et al., 2021) with the aim to produce cross-modal representations which can perform well on multi-modal tasks and with modalities benefiting from each other through joint training (Alayrac et al., 2020; Akbari et al., 2021) with recent methods exploring few-shot learning (Tsimpoukelli et al., 2021). Our work does not perform multimodal training but aims to unifiy the learning objective for self-supervised learning in different modalities. We hope that this will enable better multimodal representations in the future.
items.zh: 已有大量关于同时学习多种模态表示的研究，通常使用配对数据（Aytar 等人，2017；Radford 等人，2021b；Wang 等人，2021；Singh 等人，2021），旨在产生跨模态表示，这些表示在多模态任务上表现良好，并且模态通过联合训练相互受益（Alayrac 等人，2020；Akbari 等人，2021），最近的方法探索了少样本学习（Tsimpoukelli 等人，2021）。我们的工作不进行多模态训练，而是旨在统一不同模态中自监督学习的学习目标。我们希望这将使未来的多模态表示更好。

items.en: data2vec is trained by predicting the model representations of the full input data given a partial view of the input (Figure 1). We first encode a masked version of the training sample (model in student mode) and then construct training targets by encoding the unmasked version of the input with the same model but when parameterized as an exponentially moving average of the model weights (model in teacher mode; Grill et al. 2020; Caron et al. 2021). The target representations encode all of the information in the training sample and the learning task is for the student to predict these representations given a partial view of the input.
items.zh: data2vec 通过基于输入的部分视图预测完整输入数据的模型表示来训练（图 1）。我们首先编码训练样本的掩码版本（学生模式下的模型），然后通过使用相同模型但参数化为模型权重的指数移动平均（教师模式下的模型；Grill 等人，2020；Caron 等人，2021）来编码未掩码版本的输入，从而构建训练目标。目标表示编码了训练样本中的所有信息，学习任务是学生根据输入的部分视图预测这些表示。

items.en: We use the standard Transformer architecture (Vaswani et al., 2017) with a modality-specific encoding of the input data borrowed from prior work:333While we used Transformer networks, alternative architectures may be equally applicable. for computer vision, we use the ViT-strategy of encoding an image as a sequence of patches, each spanning 16x16 pixels, input to a linear transformation (Dosovitskiy et al., 2020; Bao et al., 2021). Speech data is encoded using a multi-layer 1-D convolutional neural network that maps 16 kHz waveform to 50 Hz representations (Baevski et al., 2020b). Text is pre-processed to obtain sub-word units (Sennrich et al., 2016; Devlin et al., 2019), which are then embedded in distributional space via learned embedding vectors. We detail these methods below (§4).
items.zh: 我们使用标准 Transformer 架构（Vaswani 等人，2017），并借用先前工作的模态特定输入数据编码³³：对于计算机视觉，我们使用 ViT 策略将图像编码为一系列补丁，每个补丁大小为 16x16 像素，输入到线性变换（Dosovitskiy 等人，2020；Bao 等人，2021）。语音数据使用多层一维卷积神经网络将 16 kHz 波形映射为 50 Hz 表示（Baevski 等人，2020b）。文本经过预处理以获得子词单元（Sennrich 等人，2016；Devlin 等人，2019），然后通过学习的嵌入向量嵌入到分布空间中。我们在下面详细描述这些方法（§4）。

items.en: After the input sample has been embedded as a sequence of tokens, we mask part of these units by replacing them with a learned MASK embedding token and feed the sequence to the Transformer network. For computer vision, we follow the block-wise masking strategy of Bao et al. (2021), for speech we mask spans of latent speech representations (Baevski et al., 2020b) and for language we mask tokens (Devlin et al., 2019); §4 details each strategy.
items.zh: 在输入样本被嵌入为标记序列后，我们通过用学习的 MASK 嵌入标记替换部分单元来掩码这些单元，并将序列输入到 Transformer 网络。对于计算机视觉，我们遵循 Bao 等人（2021）的块状掩码策略；对于语音，我们掩码潜在语音表示的跨度（Baevski 等人，2020b）；对于语言，我们掩码标记（Devlin 等人，2019）；§4 详细介绍了每种策略。

items.en: The model is trained to predict the model representations of the original unmasked training sample based on an encoding of the masked sample. We predict model representations only for time-steps which are masked. The representations we predict are contextualized representations, encoding the particular time-step but also other information from the sample due to the use of self-attention in the Transformer network.444 In preliminary experiments, we found that additional context information for the targets was helpful since masking some of the time-steps when in teacher mode resulted in lower accuracy. This is an important difference to BERT (Devlin et al., 2019), wav2vec 2.0 (Baevski et al., 2020b) or BEiT, MAE, SimMIM, and MaskFeat (Bao et al., 2021; He et al., 2021; Xie et al., 2021; Wei et al., 2021) which predict targets lacking contextual information. Below, we detail how we parameterize the teacher which predicts the network representations that will serve as targets as well as how we construct the final target vectors to be predicted by the model in student-mode.
items.zh: 该模型基于掩码样本的编码，预测原始未掩码训练样本的模型表示。我们仅对掩码的时间步预测模型表示。预测的表示是上下文相关的表示，编码了特定时间步，同时也由于Transformer网络中使用自注意力机制而包含了样本中的其他信息。444在初步实验中，我们发现目标包含额外上下文信息是有帮助的，因为在教师模式下掩码部分时间步会导致准确率降低。这与BERT（Devlin等人，2019）、wav2vec 2.0（Baevski等人，2020b）或BEiT、MAE、SimMIM和MaskFeat（Bao等人，2021；He等人，2021；Xie等人，2021；Wei等人，2021）预测缺乏上下文信息的目标有重要区别。下面，我们详细说明如何参数化教师网络以预测作为目标的网络表示，以及如何构建最终的目标向量供学生模式下的模型预测。

items.en: The encoding of the unmasked training sample is parameterized by an exponentially moving average (EMA) of the model parameters (θ𝜃\theta; Tarvainen & Valpola 2018; Grill et al. 2020; Caron et al. 2021) where the weights of the model in target-mode ΔΔ\Delta are:
items.zh: 未掩码训练样本的编码通过模型参数的指数移动平均（EMA）进行参数化（θ；Tarvainen & Valpola 2018；Grill等人2020；Caron等人2021），其中目标模式下模型的权重Δ为：

items.en: We use a schedule for τ𝜏\tau that linearly increases this parameter from τ0subscript𝜏0\tau_{0} to the target value τesubscript𝜏𝑒\tau_{e} over the first τnsubscript𝜏𝑛\tau_{n} updates after which the value is kept constant for the remainder of training. This strategy results in the teacher being updated more frequently at the beginning of training, when the model is random, and less frequently later in training, when good parameters have already been learned. We found it more efficient and slightly more accurate to share the parameters of the feature encoder and the positional encoder between the teacher and student networks.
items.zh: 我们使用一个τ调度，该参数在前τn次更新中从τ0线性增加到目标值τe，之后在训练剩余部分保持恒定。这种策略使得在训练初期（模型随机时）教师更新更频繁，而在训练后期（已学到良好参数时）更新较少。我们发现共享教师网络和学生网络之间的特征编码器和位置编码器参数更高效且略微更准确。

items.en: Training targets are constructed based on the output of the top K𝐾K blocks of the teacher network for time-steps which are masked in student-mode.555 We generally use the output of the FFN prior to the last residual connection in each block as target. See the ablation in §5.4. The output of block l𝑙l at time-step t𝑡t is denoted as atlsuperscriptsubscript𝑎𝑡𝑙a_{t}^{l}. We apply a normalization to each block to obtain a^tlsuperscriptsubscript^𝑎𝑡𝑙\hat{a}_{t}^{l} before averaging the top K𝐾K blocks yt=1K​∑l=L−K+1La^tlsubscript𝑦𝑡1𝐾superscriptsubscript𝑙𝐿𝐾1𝐿superscriptsubscript^𝑎𝑡𝑙y_{t}=\frac{1}{K}\sum_{l=L-K+1}^{L}\hat{a}_{t}^{l} for a network with L𝐿L blocks in total to obtain the training target ytsubscript𝑦𝑡y_{t} for time-step t𝑡t. This creates training targets that are to be regressed by the model when in student mode. In preliminary experiments we found that averaging performed as well as predicting each block separately with a dedicated projection while enjoying the advantage of being more efficient.
items.zh: 训练目标基于教师网络顶部K个块在掩码时间步（学生模式下）的输出构建。555我们通常使用每个块中最后一个残差连接之前的FFN输出作为目标。详见§5.4的消融实验。块l在时间步t的输出记为a_t^l。我们对每个块应用归一化得到â_t^l，然后对顶部K个块取平均y_t = (1/K) ∑_{l=L-K+1}^{L} â_t^l（对于总共有L个块的网络），得到时间步t的训练目标y_t。这创建了学生模式下模型需要回归的训练目标。在初步实验中，我们发现平均法与使用专用投影分别预测每个块效果相当，同时更高效。

items.en: Normalizing the targets helps prevent the model from collapsing into a constant representation for all time-steps and it also prevents layers with high norm to dominate the target features. For speech representations, we use instance normalization (Ulyanov et al., 2016) without any learned parameters over the current input sample since neighboring representations are highly correlated due to the small stride over the input data, while for NLP and vision we found parameter-less layer normalization (Ba et al., 2016) to be sufficient. Variance-Invariance-Covariance regularization (Bardes et al., 2021) also addresses this problem but we found the above strategy to perform well and it does not introduce additional hyper-parameters.
items.zh: 对目标进行归一化有助于防止模型对所有时间步坍缩为恒定表示，并防止高范数层主导目标特征。对于语音表示，我们使用实例归一化（Ulyanov等人，2016），不包含任何可学习参数，对当前输入样本进行归一化，因为由于输入数据步长小，相邻表示高度相关；而对于NLP和视觉，我们发现无参数层归一化（Ba等人，2016）就足够了。方差-不变性-协方差正则化（Bardes等人，2021）也能解决这个问题，但我们发现上述策略表现良好且不引入额外超参数。

items.en: Given contextualized training targets ytsubscript𝑦𝑡y_{t}, we use a Smooth L1 loss to regress these targets:
items.zh: 给定上下文相关的训练目标y_t，我们使用Smooth L1损失来回归这些目标：

items.en: where β𝛽\beta controls the transition from a squared loss to an L1subscript𝐿1L_{1} loss, depending on the size of the gap between the target ytsubscript𝑦𝑡y_{t} and the model prediction ft​(x)subscript𝑓𝑡𝑥f_{t}(x) at time-step t𝑡t. The advantage of this loss is that it is less sensitive to outliers, however, we need to tune the setting of β𝛽\beta.
items.zh: 其中β控制从平方损失到L1损失的转换，取决于目标y_t与模型预测f_t(x)在时间步t的差距大小。该损失的优点是对异常值不那么敏感，但我们需要调整β的设置。

items.en: We experiment with two model sizes: data2vec Base and data2vec Large, containing either L=12𝐿12L=12 or L=24𝐿24L=24 Transformer blocks with H=768𝐻768H=768 or H=1024𝐻1024H=1024 hidden dimension (with 4×H4𝐻4\times H feed-forward inner-dimension). EMA updates are performed in fp32 for numerical stability (Manohar et al., 2021).
items.zh: 我们实验了两种模型大小：data2vec Base和data2vec Large，分别包含L=12或L=24个Transformer块，隐藏维度H=768或H=1024（前馈内维度为4×H）。EMA更新以fp32执行以保证数值稳定性（Manohar等人，2021）。

items.en: We embed images of 224x224 pixels as patches of 16x16 pixels (Dosovitskiy et al., 2020). Each patch is linearly transformed and a sequence of 196 representations is input to a standard Transformer. We follow BEiT (Bao et al., 2021) by masking blocks of multiple adjacent patches where each block contains at least 16 patches with a random aspect ratio. Different to their work, we found it more accurate to mask 60% of the patches instead of 40%. We use randomly applied resized image crops, horizontal flipping, and color jittering (Bao et al., 2021). We use the same modified image both in teacher mode and student mode.
items.zh: 我们将224x224像素的图像嵌入为16x16像素的块（Dosovitskiy等人，2020）。每个块经过线性变换，将196个表示的序列输入标准Transformer。我们遵循BEiT（Bao等人，2021），掩码多个相邻块组成的块，每个块至少包含16个块，具有随机宽高比。与他们的工作不同，我们发现掩码60%的块比40%更准确。我们使用随机应用的调整大小图像裁剪、水平翻转和颜色抖动（Bao等人，2021）。在教师模式和学生模式下使用相同的修改后图像。

items.en: ViT-B models are pre-trained for 800 epochs. As batch size we use 2,048 for ViT-B and 8,192 for ViT-L. We use Adam (Kingma & Ba, 2015) and a cosine schedule (Loshchilov & Hutter, 2016) with a single cycle where we warm up the learning rate for 40 epochs to 0.002 for ViT-B and for 80 epochs to 0.001 for ViT-L after which the learning rate is annealed following the cosine schedule. For ViT-B and ViT-L, we use β=2𝛽2\beta=2, K=6𝐾6K=6 and τ=0.9998𝜏0.9998\tau=0.9998 as a constant value with no schedule which worked well. We use stochastic depth with rate 0.2 (Huang et al., 2016). For ViT-L, we train for 1,600 epochs in total, the first 800 epochs use τ=0.9998𝜏0.9998\tau=0.9998, we then reset the learning rate schedule and the teacher weights to the student and continue for another 800 epochs with τ=0.9999𝜏0.9999\tau=0.9999.
items.zh: ViT-B模型预训练800个epoch。批大小：ViT-B使用2,048，ViT-L使用8,192。我们使用Adam（Kingma & Ba，2015）和余弦调度（Loshchilov & Hutter，2016），单周期：ViT-B学习率预热40个epoch至0.002，ViT-L预热80个epoch至0.001，之后按余弦调度退火。对于ViT-B和ViT-L，我们使用β=2，K=6，τ=0.9998作为恒定值（无调度），效果良好。我们使用随机深度，速率0.2（Huang等人，2016）。对于ViT-L，总共训练1,600个epoch，前800个epoch使用τ=0.9998，然后重置学习率调度和教师权重为学生权重，继续训练800个epoch，τ=0.9999。

items.en: For image classification we mean-pool the output of the last Transformer block and input it to a softmax-normalized classifier. We fine-tune ViT-B for 100 epochs and ViT-L for 50 epochs using Adam and a cosine schedule where we warmup up the learning rate for 20 epochs to 0.004 for ViT-B and for 5 epochs to 0.004 for ViT-L after which the learning rate follows the cosine schedule. We build on the open source implementation of BEiT (Bao et al., 2021).
items.zh: 对于图像分类，我们对最后一个Transformer块的输出进行均值池化，并输入到softmax归一化分类器。我们微调ViT-B 100个epoch，ViT-L 50个epoch，使用Adam和余弦调度：ViT-B学习率预热20个epoch至0.004，ViT-L预热5个epoch至0.004，之后按余弦调度。我们基于BEiT的开源实现（Bao等人，2021）。

items.en: Models are implemented in fairseq (Ott et al., 2019) and take as input 16 kHz waveform which is processed by a feature encoder (Baevski et al., 2020b) containing seven temporal convolutions with 512 channels, strides (5,2,2,2,2,2,2) and kernel widths (10,3,3,3,3,2,2). This results in an encoder output frequency of 50 Hz with a stride of about 20ms between each sample, and a receptive field of 400 input samples or 25ms of audio. The raw waveform input to the encoder is normalized to zero mean and unit variance.
items.zh: 模型在fairseq中实现（Ott等人，2019），输入为16 kHz波形，由特征编码器处理（Baevski等人，2020b），包含七个时间卷积层，512个通道，步长(5,2,2,2,2,2,2)，核宽度(10,3,3,3,3,2,2)。这导致编码器输出频率为50 Hz，每个样本之间步长约20ms，感受野为400个输入样本或25ms音频。编码器的原始波形输入被归一化为零均值和单位方差。

items.en: The masking strategy for the Base model is also identical to Baevski et al. (2020b): we sample p=0.065𝑝0.065p=0.065 of all time-steps to be starting indices and mask the subsequent ten time-steps. This results in approximately 49% of all time-steps to be masked for a typical training sequence. During pre-training we linearly anneal τ𝜏\tau using τ0=0.999subscript𝜏00.999\tau_{0}=0.999, τe=0.9999subscript𝜏𝑒0.9999\tau_{e}=0.9999 and τn=30,000subscript𝜏𝑛30000\tau_{n}=30,000, average the top K=8𝐾8K=8 blocks as targets and found a simple L2 loss to work well.
items.zh: Base模型的掩码策略也与Baevski等人（2020b）相同：我们采样p=0.065的时间步作为起始索引，并掩码后续十个时间步。这导致典型训练序列中约49%的时间步被掩码。预训练期间，我们使用τ0=0.999，τe=0.9999，τn=30,000线性退火τ，平均顶部K=8个块作为目标，并发现简单的L2损失效果良好。

items.en: We optimize with Adam (Kingma & Ba, 2015), with a peak learning rate of 5×10−45E-45\text{\times}{10}^{-4} for data2vec Base. The Base model uses a tri-stage scheduler which linearly warms up the learning rate over the first 3% of updates, holds it for 90% of updates and then linearly decays it over the remaining 7%. We train data2vec Base for 400K updates with a batch size of 63 minutes of audio (61M frames). We follow the fine-tuning regime of wav2vec 2.0 (Baevski et al., 2020b) whose hyper-parameters depend on the labeled data setup.
items.zh: 我们使用Adam优化（Kingma & Ba，2015），data2vec Base的峰值学习率为5×10^{-4}。Base模型使用三阶段调度：学习率在前3%的更新中线性预热，保持90%的更新，然后在剩余7%中线性衰减。我们训练data2vec Base 400K次更新，批大小为63分钟音频（6100万帧）。我们遵循wav2vec 2.0的微调机制（Baevski等人，2020b），其超参数取决于标注数据设置。

items.en: We build on the BERT re-implementation RoBERTa (Liu et al., 2019) available in fairseq (Ott et al., 2019). The input data is tokenized using a byte-pair encoding (Sennrich et al., 2016) of 50K types and the model learns an embedding for each type (Devlin et al., 2019; Liu et al., 2019) Once the data is embedded, we apply the BERT masking strategy to 15% of uniformly selected tokens: 80% are replaced by a learned mask token, 10% are left unchanged and 10% are replaced by randomly selected vocabulary token; we do not use the next-sentence prediction task. We also consider the wav2vec 2.0 strategy of masking spans of four tokens.
items.zh: 我们基于fairseq中可用的BERT重实现RoBERTa（Liu等人，2019）（Ott等人，2019）。输入数据使用50K类型的字节对编码进行分词（Sennrich等人，2016），模型学习每种类型的嵌入（Devlin等人，2019；Liu等人，2019）。数据嵌入后，我们对15%的均匀选择token应用BERT掩码策略：80%替换为学习的掩码token，10%保持不变，10%替换为随机选择的词汇token；我们不使用下一句预测任务。我们还考虑了wav2vec 2.0的掩码跨度策略，掩码四个token的跨度。

items.en: For pre-training we use τ0=0.999subscript𝜏00.999\tau_{0}=0.999, τe=0.9999subscript𝜏𝑒0.9999\tau_{e}=0.9999 and τn=100,000subscript𝜏𝑛100000\tau_{n}=100,000, K=10𝐾10K=10 and set β=4𝛽4\beta=4. The model is optimized with Adam over 1M updates using a tri-stage learning rate schedule (5%, 80% and 15% of updates for warm-up, holding and linearly decaying, respectively). The peak learning rate is 2×10−42E-42\text{\times}{10}^{-4}. We train on 16 GPUs with a total batch size of 256 sequences and each sequence is up to 512 tokens. For downstream tasks, we fine-tune the pre-trained model with four different learning rates (1×10−51E-51\text{\times}{10}^{-5}, 2×10−52E-52\text{\times}{10}^{-5}, 3×10−53E-53\text{\times}{10}^{-5}, 4×10−54E-54\text{\times}{10}^{-5}) and choose the one which performs best across all considered NLP downstream tasks.
items.zh: 预训练使用τ0=0.999，τe=0.9999，τn=100,000，K=10，β=4。模型使用Adam优化1M次更新，采用三阶段学习率调度（预热、保持和线性衰减分别占更新的5%、80%和15%）。峰值学习率为2×10^{-4}。我们在16个GPU上训练，总批大小为256个序列，每个序列最多512个token。对于下游任务，我们使用四种不同学习率（1×10^{-5}，2×10^{-5}，3×10^{-5}，4×10^{-5}）微调预训练模型，并选择在所有考虑的NLP下游任务中表现最佳的一个。

items.en: To evaluate our approach for computer vision, we pre-train data2vec on the images of the ImageNet-1K training set (Deng et al., 2009) and fine-tune the resulting model for image classification using the labeled data of the same benchmark (§4.1). Following standard practice, models are evaluated in terms of top-1 accuracy on the validation set. We distinguish between results based on a single self-supervised model, and results which train a separate visual tokenizer on additional data (Bao et al., 2021) or distill other self-supervised models (Dong et al., 2022).
items.zh: 为了评估我们的计算机视觉方法，我们在ImageNet-1K训练集的图像上预训练data2vec（Deng等人，2009），并使用同一基准的标注数据微调得到的模型进行图像分类（§4.1）。按照标准实践，模型在验证集上以top-1准确率评估。我们区分基于单一自监督模型的结果，以及使用额外数据训练单独视觉分词器（Bao等人，2021）或蒸馏其他自监督模型（Dong等人，2022）的结果。

items.en: For speech processing, we pre-train data2vec on the 960 hours of speech audio data from Librispeech (LS-960). This dataset contains relatively clean speech audio from read audiobooks in English and is a standard benchmark in the speech community. To get a sense of performance in different resource settings, we fine-tune models for automatic speech recognition using different amounts of labeled data, ranging from just 10 minutes to 960 hours. We also compare to other work from the literature, including wav2vec 2.0 (Baevski et al., 2020b) and HuBERT (Hsu et al., 2021), two popular algorithms for speech representation learning relying on discrete units of speech.
items.zh: 对于语音处理，我们在Librispeech（LS-960）的960小时语音音频数据上预训练data2vec。该数据集包含相对干净的英语有声读物朗读语音音频，是语音社区的标准基准。为了了解不同资源设置下的性能，我们使用不同数量的标注数据（从仅10分钟到960小时）微调模型进行自动语音识别。我们还与文献中的其他工作进行比较，包括wav2vec 2.0（Baevski等人，2020b）和HuBERT（Hsu等人，2021），这两种流行的语音表示学习算法依赖于离散语音单元。

items.en: To further validate our approach for speech, we also trained a model on the AudioSet benchmark (Gemmeke et al., 2017). The pre-training setup is the same as Librispeech, but we set K=12𝐾12K=12 and train for 200K updates with a batch size of 94.5 minutes of audio. We apply DeepNorm (Wang et al., 2022) and layer normalization of the targets to stabilize training. Finetuning is done on the balanced subset over 13k updates with a batch size of 21.3 minutes. Similar to Srivastava et al. (2021), we use linear softmax pooling (Wang et al., 2018b) and mixup (Tokozume et al., 2017) with probability 0.7. We add a single linear projection layer into 527 audioset classes and set the projection learning rate to 2​e−42𝑒42e-4. The pre-trained parameters are trained with a learning rate of 3​e−53𝑒53e-5 and we use masking during fine-tuning similar to Baevski et al. (2020b) with p=0.45𝑝0.45p=0.45 and mask length of 4. The results (Table 3) show that data2vec can outperform a comparable setup that uses the same pre-training and fine-tuning data.
items.zh: 为了进一步验证我们的语音方法，我们还在AudioSet基准上训练了一个模型（Gemmeke等人，2017）。预训练设置与Librispeech相同，但设置K=12，训练200K次更新，批大小为94.5分钟音频。我们应用DeepNorm（Wang等人，2022）和目标的层归一化以稳定训练。微调在平衡子集上进行13k次更新，批大小为21.3分钟。类似于Srivastava等人（2021），我们使用线性softmax池化（Wang等人，2018b）和mixup（Tokozume等人，2017），概率为0.7。我们添加一个线性投影层到527个AudioSet类别，设置投影学习率为2e-4。预训练参数以3e-5的学习率训练，微调期间使用类似Baevski等人（2020b）的掩码，p=0.45，掩码长度为4。结果（表3）显示，data2vec可以胜过使用相同预训练和微调数据的可比设置。

items.en: To get a sense of how data2vec performs for language, we adopt the same training setup as BERT (Devlin et al., 2019) by pre-training on the Books Corpus (Zhu et al., 2015) and English Wikipedia data over 1M updates and a batch size of 256 sequences. We evaluate on the General Language Understanding Evaluation (GLUE) benchmark (Wang et al., 2018a) which includes tasks for natural language inference (MNLI, QNLI, RTE), sentence similarity (MRPC, QQP and STS-B), grammaticality (CoLA), and sentiment analysis (SST-2).666MNLI (Multi Genre Natural Language Inference; Williams et al. 2018), Stanford Question Answering Dataset (QNLI; Rajpurkar et al. 2016), Recognizing Textual Entailment (RTE;Dagan et al. 2006; Haim et al. 2006; Giampiccolo et al. 2007; Bentivogli et al. 2009), and we exclude Winograd NLI task from our results similar to Devlin et al. (2019), Microsoft Research Paragraph Corpus (MRPC; Dolan & Brockett 2005), Quora Question Pairs benchmark (QQP), and the Semantic Textual Similarity Benchmark (STS-B; Cer et al. 2018), Corpus of Linguistic Acceptability (CoLA; Warstadt et al. 2018), Stanford Sentiment Treebank (SST-2; Socher et al. 2013) We fine-tune data2vec separately on the labeled data provided by each task and report the average accuracy on the development sets over five fine-tuning runs. We compare to the published BERT results as well as to the results we obtain by retraining RoBERTa in the current setup (Baseline; Liu et al. 2019) which provides a more suitable baseline to data2vec since we build on their open source code.
items.zh: 为了了解data2vec在语言上的表现，我们采用与BERT相同的训练设置（Devlin等人，2019），在Books Corpus（Zhu等人，2015）和英文Wikipedia数据上预训练1M次更新，批大小为256个序列。我们在通用语言理解评估（GLUE）基准上评估（Wang等人，2018a），该基准包括自然语言推理（MNLI、QNLI、RTE）、句子相似度（MRPC、QQP和STS-B）、语法可接受性（CoLA）和情感分析（SST-2）任务。666MNLI（多体裁自然语言推理；Williams等人2018）、斯坦福问答数据集（QNLI；Rajpurkar等人2016）、识别文本蕴含（RTE；Dagan等人2006；Haim等人2006；Giampiccolo等人2007；Bentivogli等人2009），我们排除Winograd NLI任务，类似于Devlin等人（2019）、微软研究段落语料库（MRPC；Dolan & Brockett 2005）、Quora问题对基准（QQP）和语义文本相似度基准（STS-B；Cer等人2018）、语言可接受性语料库（CoLA；Warstadt等人2018）、斯坦福情感树库（SST-2；Socher等人2013）。我们分别在每个任务提供的标注数据上微调data2vec，并报告五次微调运行在开发集上的平均准确率。我们将结果与已发表的BERT结果以及我们在当前设置下重新训练RoBERTa得到的结果（Baseline；Liu等人2019）进行比较，后者为data2vec提供了更合适的基线，因为我们基于其开源代码构建。

items.en: The results (Table 4) show that data2vec outperforms the RoBERTa baseline. When we mask spans of four BPE tokens with masking probability 0.35 (Baevski et al., 2020b), then results improve further.777We used a cosine learning rate schedule for this result. This strategy does not leave tokens unmasked or uses random targets as for BERT (§4.3).
items.zh: 结果（表4）表明，data2vec 优于 RoBERTa 基线。当我们以 0.35 的掩码概率掩码四个 BPE 标记的跨度时（Baevski 等人，2020b），结果进一步改善。777我们为此结果使用了余弦学习率调度。此策略不会留下未掩码的标记，也不会像 BERT（§4.3）那样使用随机目标。

items.en: To our knowledge this is the first successful pre-trained NLP model which does not use discrete units (words, sub-words, characters or bytes) as the training target. Instead, the model predicts a contextualized latent representation emerging from self-attention over the entire unmasked text sequence. This enables a learning task where the model needs to predict targets with specific properties of the current text sequence rather than representations which are generic to every text sequence in which the particular discrete unit occurs. Moreover, the set of training targets is not fixed, i.e., not a closed vocabulary, and the model can choose to define new targets as it sees fit, akin to an open vocabulary setting.
items.zh: 据我们所知，这是第一个成功的预训练 NLP 模型，它不使用离散单元（词、子词、字符或字节）作为训练目标。相反，该模型预测一个上下文化的潜在表示，该表示来自对整个未掩码文本序列的自注意力。这使得学习任务中模型需要预测具有当前文本序列特定属性的目标，而不是预测该特定离散单元出现的每个文本序列都通用的表示。此外，训练目标集不是固定的，即不是封闭词汇表，模型可以根据需要定义新目标，类似于开放词汇表设置。

items.en: One of the main differences of our method compared to BYOL is the use of targets which are based on averaging multiple layers from the teacher network (§3.3). This idea was partly inspired by the fact that the top layers of wav2vec 2.0 do not perform as well for downstream tasks as layers in the middle of the network (Baevski et al., 2021; Pasad et al., 2021).
items.zh: 我们的方法与 BYOL 的主要区别之一在于使用了基于教师网络多个层平均的目标（§3.3）。这一想法部分受到以下事实的启发：wav2vec 2.0 的顶层在下游任务中的表现不如网络中间层（Baevski 等人，2021；Pasad 等人，2021）。

items.en: In the next experiment, we measure performance for all three modalities when averaging K=1,…,12𝐾1…12K=1,\dots,12 layers where K=1𝐾1K=1 corresponds to predicting only the top layer similar to BYOL. For faster experimental turn-around, we train Base models with L=12𝐿12L=12 layers in total. For speech, we pre-train for 200K updates on Librispeech, fine-tune on the 10 hour labeled split of Libri-light (Kahn et al., 2019) and report word error rate without a language model on dev-other. For NLP, we report the average GLUE score on the validation set (§5.3) and for computer vision we pre-train models for 300 epochs and report the top-1 accuracy on ImageNet (§5.1).
items.zh: 在下一个实验中，我们测量了在平均 K=1,…,12 层时所有三种模态的性能，其中 K=1 对应于仅预测顶层，类似于 BYOL。为了加快实验周转，我们训练了总层数 L=12 的 Base 模型。对于语音，我们在 Librispeech 上预训练 200K 步，在 Libri-light 的 10 小时标记子集上微调（Kahn 等人，2019），并在 dev-other 上报告无语言模型的词错误率。对于 NLP，我们报告验证集上的平均 GLUE 分数（§5.3），对于计算机视觉，我们预训练模型 300 个 epoch，并报告 ImageNet 上的 top-1 准确率（§5.1）。

items.en: Teacher representations are based on self-attention over the entire input which results in contextualized targets. This distinguishes data2vec from other self-supervised approaches which construct a learning task by predicting or reconstructing local parts of the input (§2). This poses the natural question of whether contextualized targets are required for data2vec to work well.
items.zh: 教师表示基于对整个输入的自注意力，从而产生上下文化的目标。这使 data2vec 区别于其他通过预测或重建输入局部部分来构建学习任务的自监督方法（§2）。这自然引出一个问题：data2vec 的良好性能是否需要上下文化的目标。

items.en: In order to get a better sense of this, we construct target representations which do not have access to the entire input sample but rather only a pre-defined fraction of it. Concretely, we restrict the self-attention mechansim of the teacher to only be able to access a portion of the input surrounding the current time-step. Once the model is trained, we fine-tune it so that it can access the full context size. Figure 3 shows that larger context sizes lead to better downstream performance. The best accuracy is achieved when the entire input sample is visible. This shows that richer target representations can indeed lead to better performance.
items.zh: 为了更好地理解这一点，我们构建了无法访问整个输入样本而只能访问其预定义部分的目标表示。具体来说，我们将教师的自注意力机制限制为只能访问当前时间步周围的一部分输入。模型训练后，我们对其进行微调，使其能够访问完整的上下文大小。图 3 显示，更大的上下文大小会带来更好的下游性能。当整个输入样本可见时，达到最佳准确率。这表明更丰富的目标表示确实可以带来更好的性能。

items.en: Transformers blocks contain several layers which can each serve as targets. To get a sense of how different layers impact performance, we pre-train speech models on Librispeech using different layers as target features. Table 5 shows that the output of the feedforward network (FFN) block works best while the output of the self-attention block does not yield a usable model. We believe this is because the self-attention is before the residual connection and features are heavily biased towards other time-steps. This issue is alleviated by the use of FFN features since these also include the features before the self-attention.
items.zh: Transformer 块包含多个层，每层都可以作为目标。为了了解不同层对性能的影响，我们在 Librispeech 上使用不同层作为目标特征预训练语音模型。表 5 显示，前馈网络（FFN）块的输出效果最好，而自注意力块的输出无法产生可用的模型。我们认为这是因为自注意力位于残差连接之前，特征严重偏向其他时间步。使用 FFN 特征可以缓解这个问题，因为这些特征还包括自注意力之前的特征。

items.en: Our primary goal is to design a single learning mechanism for different modalities. Despite the unified learning regime, we still use modality-specific feature extractors and masking strategies. This makes sense given the vastly different nature of the input data: for example, in speech we learn from a very high resolution input (16 kHz waveform) which contains hundreds of thousands of samples for typical utterances. To process this, we apply a multilayer convolutional neural network to obtain a 50 Hz feature sequence. For NLP, word input sequences have vastly lower resolution which can be directly embedded in distributional space via a lookup table. The type of data also impacts how we should mask the input to create a challenging learning task: removing individual words provides a sufficiently challenging task but for speech it is necessary to mask spans since adjacent audio samples are highly correlated with each other. Relatedly, there has been recent work on a Transformer architecture that can directly operate on the raw data of different modalities without modality-specific feature encoders (Jaegle et al., 2021b, a). Their work is focused on supervised learning for classification tasks and we believe that our work is complementary.
items.zh: 我们的主要目标是为不同模态设计一个统一的学习机制。尽管学习机制统一，我们仍然使用模态特定的特征提取器和掩码策略。考虑到输入数据的巨大差异，这是合理的：例如，在语音中，我们从非常高分辨率的输入（16 kHz 波形）中学习，该输入包含典型话语的数十万个样本。为了处理这一点，我们应用多层卷积神经网络来获得 50 Hz 的特征序列。对于 NLP，词输入序列的分辨率要低得多，可以通过查找表直接嵌入到分布空间中。数据类型也影响我们如何掩码输入以创建具有挑战性的学习任务：移除单个词提供了足够有挑战性的任务，但对于语音，有必要掩码跨度，因为相邻音频样本高度相关。与此相关，最近有工作提出一种 Transformer 架构，可以直接对不同模态的原始数据进行操作，而无需模态特定的特征编码器（Jaegle 等人，2021b, a）。他们的工作专注于分类任务的监督学习，我们认为我们的工作是互补的。

items.en: One of the main differences of data2vec to most other masked prediction work (Devlin et al., 2019; Baevski et al., 2020b; Ling et al., 2020; Bao et al., 2021; He et al., 2021; Wei et al., 2021) is that the features of the training targets are contextualized since the features are built with self-attention over the entire unmasked input in teacher mode. And while BYOL (Grill et al., 2020) and DINO (Caron et al., 2021) also use latent target representations based on the entire input, their focus is on learning transformation-invariant representations instead of structural information within a sample.
items.zh: data2vec 与大多数其他掩码预测工作（Devlin 等人，2019；Baevski 等人，2020b；Ling 等人，2020；Bao 等人，2021；He 等人，2021；Wei 等人，2021）的主要区别之一在于，训练目标的特征是上下文化的，因为这些特征是在教师模式下通过自注意力对整个未掩码输入构建的。虽然 BYOL（Grill 等人，2020）和 DINO（Caron 等人，2021）也使用基于整个输入的潜在目标表示，但它们的重点是学习变换不变表示，而不是样本内的结构信息。

items.en: One exception is HuBERT (Hsu et al., 2021) which builds a fixed set of discrete target units by clustering Transformer layer representations. In comparison, data2vec has no limitation on the number of target units. Instead of representing each instance of particular discrete target unit with the same set of features, data2vec can build target features that are specific to the current sequence.
items.zh: 一个例外是 HuBERT（Hsu 等人，2021），它通过对 Transformer 层表示进行聚类来构建一组固定的离散目标单元。相比之下，data2vec 对目标单元的数量没有限制。data2vec 不是用相同的特征集表示每个特定离散目标单元的实例，而是可以构建特定于当前序列的目标特征。

items.en: For NLP, we believe data2vec is the first work that does not rely on pre-defined target units. Most other work uses either words, sub-words (Radford et al., 2018; Devlin et al., 2019), characters (Tay et al., 2021) or even bytes (Xue et al., 2021). Aside, defining word boundaries is not straightforward for some Asian languages. Contextualized targets enable integrating features from the entire sequence into the training target which provides a richer self-supervised task. Furthermore, the representation of each instance of a particular unit (word/sub-word/character/byte) can differ for the masked prediction task. This enables to associate a different meaning to a particular depending on the context it occurs in. It also relieves the model from the need to learn a single set of features for a target unit that fits all instances of this unit.
items.zh: 对于 NLP，我们认为 data2vec 是第一个不依赖预定义目标单元的工作。大多数其他工作使用词、子词（Radford 等人，2018；Devlin 等人，2019）、字符（Tay 等人，2021）甚至字节（Xue 等人，2021）。此外，对于某些亚洲语言，定义词边界并不简单。上下文化的目标使得将整个序列的特征整合到训练目标中成为可能，从而提供更丰富的自监督任务。此外，特定单元（词/子词/字符/字节）的每个实例的表示在掩码预测任务中可以不同。这使得可以根据上下文为特定单元关联不同的含义。这也减轻了模型学习一组适用于该单元所有实例的目标特征的需要。

items.en: A common failure mode when learning targets is for similar representations for targets to be produced resulting in a trivial task (Jing et al., 2021). To deal with this, contrastive models such as wav2vec 2.0 (Baevski et al., 2020b) use the same target representation both as a positive and a negative example. BYOL (Grill et al., 2020) do not optimize the teacher parameters to minimize the loss and VicReg (Bardes et al., 2021) adds an explicit loss encouraging variance among different representations.
items.zh: 学习目标时的一个常见失败模式是产生相似的目标表示，导致任务变得平凡（Jing 等人，2021）。为了解决这个问题，对比模型如 wav2vec 2.0（Baevski 等人，2020b）将相同的目标表示同时用作正例和负例。BYOL（Grill 等人，2020）不优化教师参数以最小化损失，而 VicReg（Bardes 等人，2021）添加了显式损失以鼓励不同表示之间的方差。

items.en: We found that collapse is most likely to happen in the following scenarios: First, the learning rate is too large or the learning rate warmup is too short which can often be solved by tuning the respective hyperparameters. Second, τ𝜏\tau is too low which leads to student model collapse and is then propagated to the teacher. This can be addressed by tuning τ0subscript𝜏0\tau_{0}, τesubscript𝜏𝑒\tau_{e} and τnsubscript𝜏𝑛\tau_{n}. Third, we found collapse to be more likely for modalities where adjacent targets are very correlated and where longer spans need to be masked, e.g., speech. We address this by promoting variance through normalizing target representations over the sequence or batch (Grill et al., 2020). For models where targets are less correlated, such as vision and NLP, momentum tracking is sufficient.
items.zh: 我们发现崩溃最可能发生在以下场景：第一，学习率太大或学习率预热太短，通常可以通过调整相应的超参数来解决。第二，τ 太低，导致学生模型崩溃，然后传播到教师。这可以通过调整 τ0、τe 和 τn 来解决。第三，我们发现对于相邻目标高度相关且需要掩码较长跨度的模态（例如语音），崩溃更可能发生。我们通过沿序列或批次归一化目标表示来促进方差（Grill 等人，2020）。对于目标相关性较低的模型，如视觉和 NLP，动量跟踪就足够了。

items.en: Recent work showed that uniform model architectures can be effective for multiple modalities (Jaegle et al., 2021b). Whereas we show that a single self-supervised learning regime can be effective for vision, speech and language. The key idea is to regress contextualized representations based on a partial input view. data2vec outperforms prior self-supervised work on ImageNet-1K for ViT-B and ViT-L single models, it improves over prior work on speech recognition for the low-resource Libri-light setups, and it outperforms RoBERTa on GLUE in the original BERT setup.
items.zh: 最近的工作表明，统一的模型架构可以有效地处理多种模态（Jaegle 等人，2021b）。而我们表明，单一的自监督学习机制可以有效地处理视觉、语音和语言。关键思想是基于部分输入视图回归上下文化的表示。data2vec 在 ImageNet-1K 上对于 ViT-B 和 ViT-L 单模型优于先前的自监督工作，在低资源 Libri-light 设置下改进了先前的语音识别工作，并且在原始 BERT 设置下在 GLUE 上优于 RoBERTa。

items.en: A single learning method for multiple modalities will make it easier to learn across modalities and future work may investigate tasks such as audio-visual speech recognition or cross-modal retrieval. Our approach still uses modality-specific input encoders and we adopt modality-specific masking strategies which future work may unify.
items.zh: 针对多种模态的统一学习方法将使跨模态学习更容易，未来的工作可以研究诸如音视频语音识别或跨模态检索等任务。我们的方法仍然使用模态特定的输入编码器，并采用模态特定的掩码策略，未来的工作可能统一这些策略。

items.en: We thank Brenden Lake, Dhruv Batra, Marco Baroni and Laurens van der Maaten for helpful discussions.
items.zh: 我们感谢 Brenden Lake、Dhruv Batra、Marco Baroni 和 Laurens van der Maaten 的有益讨论。
